subtitle.de: **Geschäftsführung — live aus Xentral.** Umsatz, Marge, Forderungen und der AI-Impact deiner Agenten auf einen Blick.
subtitle.en: **Executive view — live from Xentral.** Revenue, margin, receivables and your agents' AI impact at a glance.

config.prompt: Umsatz pro Monat aus Rechnungen, letzte 12 Monate, als Zeitreihe
config.sqlString:
SELECT
  TO_CHAR(DATE_TRUNC('month', i.date), 'YYYY-MM') AS "Monat",
  ROUND(SUM(i.net_revenue), 2) AS "Umsatz"
FROM invoices i
WHERE i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created', 'unknown')
  AND i.date >= DATEADD(month, -12, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
  AND i.date < DATEADD(month, 1, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

config.prompt: Umsatz pro Monat aktuelles Jahr (YTD) im Vergleich zum Vorjahr aus Rechnungen, zwei Serien
config.sqlString:
WITH invoice_metrics AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', i.date) AS month_start,
    EXTRACT(year FROM i.date) AS sales_year,
    SUM(i.net_revenue) AS net_revenue
  FROM invoices i
  WHERE i.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled', 'unknown')
    AND i.date BETWEEN date_trunc('year', current_date) - interval '1 year'
                   AND current_date
  GROUP BY 1, 2
),
period_bounds AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('year', current_date) AS current_year_start,
    current_date AS current_date,
    date_trunc('year', current_date) - interval '1 year' AS last_year_start,
    dateadd(day, -1, current_date) - interval '1 year' AS last_year_end
)
SELECT
  to_char(m.month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Monat",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date) THEN m.net_revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) AS "Umsatz aktuelles Jahr (YTD)",
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date) - 1 THEN m.net_revenue ELSE 0 END), 2) AS "Umsatz Vorjahr",
  ROUND(
    SUM(CASE WHEN m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date) THEN m.net_revenue ELSE 0 END)
    - SUM(CASE WHEN m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date) - 1 THEN m.net_revenue ELSE 0 END)
  , 2) AS "Differenz"
FROM invoice_metrics m
CROSS JOIN period_bounds b
WHERE
  (
    m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date)
    AND m.month_start BETWEEN b.current_year_start AND date_trunc('month', b.current_date)
  )
  OR
  (
    m.sales_year = EXTRACT(year FROM current_date) - 1
    AND m.month_start BETWEEN b.last_year_start AND date_trunc('month', b.last_year_end)
  )
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

config.prompt: Umsatz pro Monat gruppiert nach Vertriebskanal (Projekt), letzte 6 Monate, gestapelt
config.sqlString:
WITH relevant_sales AS (
    SELECT
        so.sales_order_id,
        so.project_id,
        so.date,
        so.status,
        so.net_revenue
    FROM sales_orders so
    LEFT JOIN projects p USING (project_id)
    WHERE so.status <> 'created'
      AND so.date >= DATEADD(month, -6, CURRENT_DATE)
),
monthly_sales AS (
    SELECT
        DATE_TRUNC('month', date) AS month_start,
        project_id,
        SUM(net_revenue) AS revenue
    FROM relevant_sales
    GROUP BY 1, 2
)
SELECT
    TO_CHAR(ms.month_start, 'YYYY-MM') AS "Monat",
    p.name AS "Projekt / Vertriebskanal",
    ROUND(ms.revenue, 2) AS "Umsatz"
FROM monthly_sales ms
LEFT JOIN projects p
    ON ms.project_id = p.project_id
ORDER BY ms.month_start ASC, "Umsatz" DESC;

config.prompt: Umsatzanteile pro Vertriebskanal (Projekt) im laufenden Monat
config.sqlString:
WITH order_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        so.project_id,
        so.shop_id,
        SUM(so.net_revenue) AS net_revenue
    FROM sales_orders so
    WHERE so.status != 'created'
      AND so.date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      AND so.date < DATEADD(month, 1, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
channel_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        COALESCE(s.designation, 'Unbekannt') AS vertriebskanal,
        COALESCE(p.abbreviation, 'Kein Projekt') AS projektkuerzel,
        SUM(orv.net_revenue) AS nettoumsatz
    FROM order_revenue orv
    LEFT JOIN shops s
        ON s.shop_id = orv.shop_id
    LEFT JOIN projects p
        ON p.project_id = orv.project_id
    GROUP BY 1, 2
),
total_revenue AS (
    SELECT
        SUM(nettoumsatz) AS gesamtumsatz
    FROM channel_revenue
)
SELECT
    cr.vertriebskanal AS "Vertriebskanal",
    cr.projektkuerzel AS "Projekt",
    ROUND(cr.nettoumsatz, 2) AS "Nettoumsatz",
    ROUND(
        100.0 * cr.nettoumsatz / NULLIF(tr.gesamtumsatz, 0),
        2
    ) AS "Umsatzanteil in %"
FROM channel_revenue cr
CROSS JOIN total_revenue tr
ORDER BY "Nettoumsatz" DESC, "Vertriebskanal", "Projekt";

config.prompt: Top 10 Kunden nach Umsatz aus Rechnungen seit Jahresanfang, absteigend
config.sqlString:
SELECT
  a.name AS "Kunde",
  SUM(i.xen_net_revenue) AS "Umsatz"
FROM invoices i
LEFT JOIN addresses a ON i.address_id = a.address_id
WHERE i.status NOT IN ('canceled', 'created')
  AND i.date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
GROUP BY a.address_id, a.name
ORDER BY "Umsatz" DESC
LIMIT 10

config.prompt: Bruttomarge im laufenden Monat in Prozent aus Rechnungen, ein einzelner Wert
config.sqlString:
WITH relevant_invoice_ids AS (
    SELECT
        i.invoice_id
    FROM invoices i
    LEFT JOIN credit_notes cn USING (invoice_id)
    WHERE NOT (
        i.status IN ('canceled', 'created')
        AND (cn.status IS NULL OR cn.status IN ('created', 'canceled'))
    )
    GROUP BY 1
),
invoice_metrics AS (
    SELECT
        i.invoice_id,
        i.date,
        i.customer_number,
        SUM(i.net_revenue) AS net_revenue,
        SUM(i.net_profit) AS cm1
    FROM relevant_invoice_ids ids
    LEFT JOIN invoices i USING (invoice_id)
    WHERE i.date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE)
      AND i.date < DATEADD(month, 1, DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE))
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3
)
SELECT
    ROUND(
        (SUM(cm1)::NUMERIC(23, 8) / NULLIF(SUM(net_revenue)::NUMERIC(23, 8), 0)) * 100,
        2
    ) AS "Bruttomarge in %"
FROM invoice_metrics;

config.prompt: Top 10 Produkte nach Umsatz aus Rechnungspositionen seit Jahresanfang, absteigend
config.sqlString:
SELECT
    p.product_number AS "SKU",
    COALESCE(p.product_name_de, p.product_name_en) AS "Artikel",
    COALESCE(ROUND(SUM(ii.net_price::NUMERIC(23,8) * ii.quantity::NUMERIC(23,8) * (1 - COALESCE(ii.discount, 0)::NUMERIC(23,8))), 2), 0) AS "Umsatz"
FROM invoice_items ii
JOIN invoices i
    ON ii.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
LEFT JOIN products p
    ON ii.product_id = p.product_id
WHERE i.date >= DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE)
  AND i.date < DATEADD(year, 1, DATE_TRUNC('year', CURRENT_DATE))
  AND i.status NOT IN ('created', 'canceled')
GROUP BY
    1, 2
ORDER BY
    "Umsatz" DESC
LIMIT 10;

en.title: CEO Cockpit
en.description: Executive cockpit with revenue, margin, channel mix, top customers and operations health — built for board presentations and sales demos.

de.title: CEO-Cockpit
de.description: Geschäftsführungs-Cockpit mit Umsatz, Marge, Kanalmix, Top-Kunden und Operations-Gesundheit — gebaut für Boardmeetings und Vertriebsdemos.
